a.class: btn btn-primary btn-lg js_check_product a-submit text-uppercase d-block d-sm-inline-block w-100 flex-grow-1 mt-3
btn btn-primary-soft btn-lg o_we_buy_now mt-3 mt-md-0 d-block d-md-inline-block w-md-auto ml-0 ml-md-2
d-none d-md-inline-block btn btn-primary-soft btn-lg mt8 o_add_compare_dyn w-100 text-uppercase
btn btn-secondary btn-lg o_add_wishlist_dyn text-uppercase d-block d-sm-inline-block w-100 flex-grow-1 mt-2

div.div: Free shipping within CH and EU
Free shipping within CH and EU
Buy now, get product in 3-5 days
Free shipping within CH and EU

div.p: To help you select the correct size of garment,we've put together our recommendation below
Chest contour. Measure around the widest point of the chest,keeping the tape horizontal.
Waist contour. Measure around the narrowest point of the waist, keeping the tape horizontal.
Hip contour. Keeping the feet together, measure around the widest point of the hip, keeping the tape horizontal.
div.h4: How to choose the Right Size
div.p: Measures are expressed in centimetres. If the taken measures are between two sizes, choose the smallest if you prefer a tighter fitting or the largest if you prefer a baggier fitting.
To help you select the correct size of garment,we've put together our recommendation below
Chest contour. Measure around the widest point of the chest,keeping the tape horizontal.
Waist contour. Measure around the narrowest point of the waist, keeping the tape horizontal.
Hip contour. Keeping the feet together, measure around the widest point of the hip, keeping the tape horizontal.
div.h4: How to choose the Right Size
div.p: Measures are expressed in centimetres. If the taken measures are between two sizes, choose the smallest if you prefer a tighter fitting or the largest if you prefer a baggier fitting.

template.name: Theme Prime: Add to wishlist in product page

div.class: o-image-product d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center h-100 embed-responsive embed-responsive-16by9
o-image-product d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center h-100 position-relative

div.t-if: (len(languages) > 1 or (website and (editable or translatable))) or (website_sale_pricelists and len(website_sale_pricelists)>1)
